description_long: This object represents a police officer, but it is extremely minimal and abstract, consisting of only two small, dark, linear shapes that are spaced apart. There are no discernible human features such as a head, torso, limbs, or uniform details. The shapes are thin and short, lacking any visible equipment, accessories, or insignia. No facial features, clothing textures, or police-specific items are present. The object does not display any recognizable posture or stance. Its overall form is highly simplified and does not convey the typical appearance of a police officer.
description: A highly abstract and minimal representation of a police officer, consisting of two small, dark, linear shapes with no visible features or details.
description_view_0: Two short, dark lines are visible, spaced apart horizontally in the center of the view.
description_view_1: Only one small, dark line is visible on the right side, with the other line not visible from this angle.
description_view_2: Both dark lines are visible, similar to view 0, but with a slight change in their angle.
description_view_3: A single small, dark line is visible on the left side, mirroring view 1.
attribute_uniform_type: No visible uniform; only two small, dark, linear shapes are present with no discernible clothing or features.
